title: The v0.1 control-plane contract is flat JSON under a control-plane root
context: The reference CLI, schemas, examples, and dogfood control objects already assume one JSON file per object, but the consultation draft still shows a mixed markdown and YAML layout with per-object directories and event logs. Freezing the repo contract requires one portable default that tools can implement consistently.
decision: For v0.1, CCP uses one JSON file per core object under a control-plane root. The control plane may be a standalone repository or a repo-local control/ subdirectory. Event-log files, markdown or YAML object formats, and directory-per-object layouts are deferred beyond the portable v0.1 baseline.
alternatives_considered: Keep the mixed markdown and YAML layout from the consultation draft as the default
Make event logs and directory-per-object layouts mandatory in v0.1
consequences: The CLI and schemas can enforce one small boring default representation
More expressive layouts remain possible later as optional extensions instead of being part of the v0.1 interoperability baseline
